name: Date Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up and mash the dates.
2. Place the mashed dates in a well-sealed jar with the vodka.
3. Seal the jar tightly and shake occasionally for one week.
4. After one week, strain the mixture through a wire strainer to pour off the liquid.
5. Press the dates firmly with a clean cloth to wring out any remaining liquid.
6. Combine the strained liquids with the sugar syrup.
7. Filter the combined mixture through cheesecloth to remove any fruit pulp.
